summary: Completed all 12 tasks for Phase 1b: AST Code Navigation. Three MCP tools (code_outline, code_search, code_unfold) implemented using tree-sitter WASM grammars for TypeScript, JavaScript, and Python. 35 tests pass across 5 test files.
learnings: web-tree-sitter v0.26 WASM format is incompatible with tree-sitter-wasms v0.1.13 (built against tree-sitter-cli 0.20); downgraded to web-tree-sitter ^0.24.7 for compatibility
web-tree-sitter 0.24 default export IS the Parser constructor (function type); in 0.26 Parser and Language are separate named exports
lint-staged stash/restore continues to absorb unrelated staged files into commits — commit messages may not match actual changes
arch baselines needed bumps: dependency-depth from 245 to 250 after wiring code-nav into core exports
cyclomatic complexity threshold of 15 required refactoring getNodeName and getOutline into smaller helper functions (processExportStatement, extractSymbols, etc.)
tsup externalizes all dependencies by default, so web-tree-sitter and tree-sitter-wasms require calls are preserved correctly in the bundle
pending: Phase 2: Plan and execute content deduplication
Phase 3: Plan and execute structured event log

decisions.why: WASM binary format incompatibility with tree-sitter-wasms 0.1.13 which was built with tree-sitter-cli 0.20.x

decisions.what: Pure pattern adoption, no code reuse
